message.content:
@startuml
participant "Resident" as R
participant "WeResident" as WRes
participant "WeID" as WID
participant "WeService" as WService

title Provider Login Into Provider App =

R ->> WRes : Send username:password /login

alt [Provider already exist]
    WRes ->> WID : Get Token by username:password /oauth/authorize
    WID -->> WRes : Return Token to WeResident
    WRes -- R : Return {"token": "jwt-token"}
end

title Provider Query/Search Service =

Query services including token
/weservices/services
Header
Authorization: Bear {jwt-token}

Query Service schema
{"query":"string","status":12}

alt [above token is valid]
    WID -- R : verify token
    WID -- WRes : 200
    WRes -- WService : Response services data

    note right of WRes
    Service Data Array schema
    {"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"}
    "total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5
    endnote

    [Token is expired/invalid]
    WID -- R : verify token
    WID -- WRes : 400
    WRes -- WService : Response 401 status

title Create Order(Request) =

Create Service
POST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order

Order Request schema
{"resident":"$userId","service":"$serviceID","pricingModel":{},"noteDetail":"string","address":"string","schedule":Time}

WID -- R : verify token
WID -- WRes : 200
WRes -- WService : Response Service Data(JSON)

Comment(chat) in Order
POST: /weservices/order/{orderID}/comment

Comment Data
{"content":"string"}

WID -- R : verify token
WID -- WRes : 200
R -- WRes : 200

@enduml
